original text:
This letter is being sent on behalf of Dr Conor Gilligan - a researcher from the University of Newcastle and Professor Dan Lubman and Ms Fiona Blee from Turning Point Alcohol and Drug Centre.
The researchers are interested in helping parents/guardians deal with the challenges associated with their children starting to drink alcohol and would like your help in finding the best way to work with parents.
You are invited to attend a workshop at the school at Collingwood College on Wednesday, 30 October at 6:30pm.
They will also be conducting discussions with small groups of parents/guardians (up to 10) after the workshop, or if you prefer, you can take part by telephone interview at another time. This is an opportunity to share your views and have your opinion heard.
Please note that you are free to attend the workshop without committing to participate in these additional discussions.
Please read the attached information statement and register your interest if you would like to participate.
Contact the researcher at Conor.Gilligan@newcastle.edu.au or 02 4042 0553 for further information.

Contact the researcher at Conor.Gilligan@newcastle.edu.au or 02 4042 0553 for further information.

original text:
Part of being a financial planner is helping clients figure out to budget and save. When it comes to the savings question, the concept of paying yourself first is tremendously important. The temptation toward immediate gratification is so strong that many people find it hard to set aside savings once that money is in hand. Growing a habit for setting aside savings first and creating a budget for spending after you save can smooth the way for reaching your financial goals.
I like to think of savings in layers. There are the big ticket items such as retirement, home purchase and college and smaller ticket items like a vacation, new car or home remodel project. Next there is the ever-important emergency fund - money you would need to live on if you were unable to generate income for a period of time. Finally there is what I like to call the "rainy day" fund. This is a subset of the emergency fund - money you would need for a surprise expense like a broken appliance, auto repair or a trip to the emergency room.
How often does it rain in your household? This will determine how much you need to set aside for unexpected expenses. In a recent survey, more than a third of Americans responded that they would rely on credit card or other debt to cover an unexpected $1,000 expense. Building a cash cushion to soften the blow of surprise expenses is an essential step toward financial security. Using the "pay yourself first" approach by sending a small amount of every paycheck to a dedicated savings account can help to build this very basic layer of financial defense for a household.
I think of the emergency fund separately from the rainy day fund. A true emergency is rare, but if it happens, it is big and can have devastating consequences for those who are unprepared. Most financial planners recommend families have between 3 and 6 months worth of living expenses set aside in the even of a true emergency like the loss of a job or major medical expense. If you live in a single-earner household with dependents or have uneven or unpredictable income, it might be wise to have an even larger emergency cushion saved. It can be a challenge to build up this amount in savings while at the same time saving for retirement and paying down debt. This is where it is important to find a balance and develop another layer on the "pay yourself first" savings cake.
Retirement savings is so very important! It is never too early to start paying your future self first. If you have the option to set aside money for retirement through an employer plan such as a 401(k) or 403(b) account, do so right away. If your employer matches a portion of your own contribution, aim to contribute at least enough to get that full match to start. As your salary increases, make a point of increasing your deferrals into the retirement account as much as you can until you have reached the maximum allowed. In 2018, individuals under age 50 can put aside as much as $18,500 in pre-tax dollars. Add $6,000 to that if you are over 50. There are several different types of retirement savings options out there, each with its own rules and limits. Take some time and study up to be sure you choose the right place to save. The most important thing is that you should be saving, early and often.

original text:
Gamesmanship? As we maintain, it is as old as cricket.
Almost all the great names to have graced the game were adept at it. WG Grace was an incorrigible master at the art. Warwick Armstrong was yet another colossus. And with Douglas Jardine, we get into a really murky zone.
Even Don Bradman was not far behind.
In his autobiography, The Gloves Are Off, the English wicketkeeper Godfrey Evans recalls an incident which places the all-time best batsman of the world in the same league as the current day cricketers in one rather questionable category. That of needless appealing.
It was early 1947, and Denis Compton was playing one of the most important innings of his life, battling the attack comprising of Ray Lindwall, Keith Miller and Ernie Toshack in his bid to save the Adelaide Test.
England, already down 0-2 in the series, had batted well enough to post 460 in the first innings. And when Alec Bedser had dismissed Bradman for a duck, they had glimpsed an opportunity. But all that only led to them trailing by 27 in the first innings, with Arthur Morris hitting 122 and Miller hammering an unbeaten 141.
In the second innings, on the penultimate day, England lost Bill Edrich, Wally Hammond, Joe Hardstaff Jr and Jack Ikin in quick succession, to slump from 178 for 2 to 215 for 6. By now the hosts were like prowling leopards on the field, licking their lips in anticipation, sniffing victory.
But Compton held on, demonstrating a stubborn, tenacious side to his dashing debonair image. By the end of the day, he had lost Norman Yardley and Bedser, but was still unbeaten on 52 as the tourists finished on 274 for 8.
The match, though, was hardly safe as yet. The firepower of Australian batting could make a mockery of a small target.
But, the last day of the match saw Compton at his very best, sticking to the wicket and also scoring runs. At the other end, he had an able partner in Evans. The latter did not bother with scoring, spending over two hours at the wicket for his 10 runs. But time was eaten out of the game, and as Compton neared his hundred the lead extended to over 300.
The Australians were growing frustrated.
And now the incident happened, beautifully narrated in Evans's book.
Yes, Bradman was on the right side of logic and law ... but perhaps not that esoteric element called spirit.
But, then, as we maintain, the spirit of cricket is a curious concoction invented by armchair romantics of the game. It seldom transpires in the actual field of play.
Let us end by recalling what followed in the game.
Compton got his well-deserved hundred and England declared immediately, setting a target of 314. Given that Morris completed his second century of the match, Bradman hit an unbeaten 56, and Australia reached 215 for one in the little time that remained, there remains little doubt about what would have transpired if Compton had not stuck it out so manfully.
Previous articleIs Shaun Marsh's selection justified?

Score 4/5, played 12273 times.
The police arrived too late, the woman who called them for help is now murdered and her body parts have been torn and scattered around the house. It is your duty to find all the missing parts.
Use the mouse to search every nook and cranny of the house and click on object or body parts to pick it up. You must collect all of her to end the game.
- 2185521 Scary Games played so far.

original text:
NEW YORK - Dave Matthews Band has teamed up with Verizon Reads for a two-day book drive during the Dave Matthews Band Island Getaway presented by Verizon at picturesque Randall's Island, N.Y., the weekend of July 30-31.
Verizon Reads, a public charity, is donating 50,000 books during the event as a result of an association with Scholastic, Inc., global children's publishing and media company. A literacy partner of Verizon Reads, New York Reads will assist in the distribution of 40,000 books to 40 nonprofit organizations, including more than a dozen public schools, in each of New York's five boroughs. Another 10,000 books will be sent to Dave Matthews Band's home state, where they will be distributed by the Virginia Literacy Foundation.
"The lack of access to books has been noted as a leading cause of illiteracy among children in America," explained Andrew Brown, president - Verizon Reads. "While it is essential to highlight illiteracy, Verizon Reads, Dave Matthews Band and Clear Channel Entertainment together are unlocking the promise of literacy by putting books in the hands of children who otherwise might not have access to these essential tools for academic and personal development."
Verizon volunteers will be on hand during the two-day Island Getaway assisting with book donations and distributions as part of the Verizon Reads initiative, which collected and helped to distribute more than 1 million books in 2004.
Dave Matthews Band Island Getaway is presented by Verizon and is a collaboration of Ron Delsener Presents, a division of Clear Channel Music; Dave Matthews Band; and branding specialists Clear Channel Entertainment Properties. Leveraging its extensive artist relationships and production resources, Ron Delsener Presents secured the talent lineup and is producing the weekend event. Clear Channel Entertainment Properties created and marketed the custom-branded entertainment opportunity for sponsors.
Verizon is committed to championing literacy in America. The company conducts a national campaign to increase community awareness and to generate additional funding and support for literacy programs that serve adults, children and families. Working under the banner of Verizon Reads, a public charity, the award-winning philanthropy program reaches out to the more than 40 million Americans who have low literacy skills. For more information on Verizon Reads, visit .
With more than $71 billion in annual revenues, Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is one of the world's leading providers of communications services. Verizon has a diverse work force of more than 214,000 in four business units: Domestic Telecom provides customers based in 28 states with wireline and other telecommunications services, including broadband. Verizon Wireless owns and operates the nation's most reliable wireless network, serving 47.4 million voice and data customers across the United States. Information Services operates directory publishing businesses and provides electronic commerce services. International includes wireline and wireless operations and investments, primarily in the Americas and Europe. For more information, visit .

Actually, Printful also falls into the category of dropshipper, or a supplier that stores the products for youpersonally, packages them, and ships them out to your customers after a buy. So, essentially, all you have to do is upload your own layouts and start posting them onto your website to start selling. Within this Printful review, we will outline the benefits of the service and reveal the reason why many users select Printful over the alternatives.
The short story Is that Printful doesn't have as large of selection of products when compared with the competition. If I wanted to publish and dropship some layouts on coasters, I would have to look elsewhere. The same is true for more unique items such as yoga mats and jewelry. However, there is an onslaught of user reviews out there that state Printful is their go-to printing media because of the quality of products. And that's a major thing.
You may have to Cut down on the selection of items that you sell on your website, but you know that the tops are hardy, the printing is not going to wash off quickly, and clients aren't going to get ticked off because of a late delivery.
Of course, not All printing and dropshipping companies are perfect. I've seen users article dreadful Printful reviews, talking about the way the customer support is lacking or the way the print did not appear as smart as they thought. However, nearly all retailers seem to agree that Printful is your leader in this market.
1 thing to Remember is that it often is dependent upon the sort of product you're printing on, the provider you choose, and the quality of graphic you upload. So, 1 type of shirt might look fantastic from Printful, however the tote bags might not look exactly perfect. The primary way to work out if Printful is to you is to upload a few of your layouts and purchase samples. In this manner, you can compare pricing, quality, and shipping rate to other printing companies and see which one is for you.
For This Printful review, we'll prevent the caliber of its products, because that really requires you to purchase some samples. But, we'll talk about pricing, ease-of-use, client support, and the selection of goods. This way, you'll have a better idea of just how Printful can work for you and when the integration and design tools are enough for your industry.
Printful provides the goods, Prints on the products, packages and fulfills the order and sends it straight to your clients, all you have to do is send orders to them and also the sequence information and they will handle the rest. To learn more about how their process works, have a look at the Printful Printing Order Lifecycle.
They are in the business Of assisting you to create products for your business, and they supply all the necessary tools and resources to help you easily integrate the dropshipping process into your ecommerce site so you can offer a seamless experience to your clients. They offer plenty of ecommerce integrations so you can use their service no matter which platform you decide to market, they're transparent about their goods and delivery pricing so it is easy to understand their prices and employ it to your product markups, they supply design, photography and branding services so your products can appear their best and they are located in North America as well as Europe in order to readily reach the largest consumer markets.
Another cost to Consider is your sample sequence. As I mentioned before, the only way to really see if the quality of the products from Printful are perfect for you is to send a sample on your own.
The sample Orders from Printful are fair. You receive a 20% discount on the list cost, together with free shipping to choose locations.
This might cause Problems for those attempting to try out new products on a regular basis. However, the firm does have any ways to gain additional sample orders-such as by integrating with an ecommerce platform or creating more than $300 in the previous month.
Another big Question most retailers have is whether or not it's fast and easy to walk through the print layout centre. Also, what's it like trying to get those products on your website?
I'd choose The size which I'd like to sell, then upload the printing document that is going to move onto that canvas.
In general, the Guide from Printful is very clear about what you might want to change with your upload. For instance, most random JPGs you upload in the computer are going to be too small for printing onto a canvas. You are going to want to have a massive JPG or PNG that you exported from a RAW file in something like Lightroom or Photoshop.
After that, you Either place your customized order or store it to your connected ecommerce platform. If you do have it connected to a stage the product automatically syncs to your shop.
Printful Is for ecommerce entrepreneurs who want the ease of selling dropshipped goods without sacrificing their branding in the process. Whether you're trying to find a way to market your designs to your customers be it on custom t-shirts, canvases, phone cases, pillows and much more, or if you're interested in starting any kind of product-based business without the annoyance of owning inventory or manufacturing materials, then Printful is for you.
They are always Growing their products and services offerings, and since they're so receptive to their own customer's needs and wants their number of vendors continues to grow. Their efficiency, transparency, high quality merchandise offering and diverse selection are part of the reason why they're so powerful, and their ability to work with businesses to help them provide the best service for their clients is what keeps them growing.
You do not Need to have Any previous business experience in regards to working with Printful. The services they offer are available to both experienced entrepreneurs as well as new small business owners, so if you've never started your own business or haven't sourced merchandise from a provider before then provide Printful an attempt! There's no minimum order requirement, no monthly charges, you only pay for orders because your customers make them it's a low-risk way to start your own organization.
What they provide sellers Extends far beyond just their product offering and regular dropshipping services. Those are both a huge part of what makes their service so precious but they also offer other tools and resources that allow sellers to set up their stores more easily, create more beautiful products or just generally help sellers use Printful's support to its fullest extent.
There are several Different printing procedures but those who Printful sticks to are Direct-to-Garment (DTG) printing since it's a price and labor efficient way to print single order things (and the main reason they don't require minimum orders), but they also offer you all-over sublimation printing for some clothing items, screen printing in some cases (for big purchases only) and embroidery for hats and coming shortly for attire.
When it comes to Printing, Printful makes it easy for you. You don't have to think about picking the best printing way of the product you're printing on, every product provided on their site is published in the way that best suits the product, so you don't need to explore different printing methods and their advantages and disadvantages, Printful's got it covered.
For more information Regarding their products and product pricing, check out Printful's Custom Products page. If you are interested in dropshipping a product that you don't see offered on Printful yet, check out their Upcoming Product & Features page to find out if it is coming shortly. They listen for their vendors and they add new products regularly, so if there's a product you need to see just let them know via their New Feature Requests page.
Printful also offers a Warehousing and fulfillment service where they are ready to shop, pick, pack, and ship goods on behalf of merchants  -  they don't even have to be Printful merchandise! Printful has created a sophisticated community of transport, fulfillment, and logistics options they hire out to retailers who demand access to such resources.
As Printful supplies a Dropshipping service, there's no need for one to handle or manage any of this product or inventory, and you do not manage the packaging, shipping or fulfillment aspects . Printful shops, prints, picks, packs, ships and fulfills every item, so you don't ever have to.
This Is the Reason Why dropshipping Is this attractive business model for entrepreneurs who are starting their first store or do not have a large budget to invest in product inventory or manufacturing tools. It supplies a low-risk way for vendors to supply fantastic products to their clients, and it allows sellers to concentrate on other aspects of their shops such as the layouts, branding, customer service or promotion without needing to worry about the technical side of things like printing goods and shipping them.
That can, of course, Mean that you're paying to get Printful's services and also for providing warehousing, shipping, and satisfaction so as to ensure it is a high-value business version for you. While you do not pay for their support in monthly fees or minimum orders, your profit margins will be affected and will be smaller than if you're fabricating products . This drawback isn't exclusive to Printful, it applies to the dropshipping business model as a whole. It is, nevertheless, an important aspect of dropshipping to keep in mind so you can prepare your margins accordingly.
Printful's seasoned Team can also help you with the design requirements you may want to receive your ecommerce store off the floor. Not only will they help you prepare print documents for Printful products, but they are also able to assist you with any design needs such as redesigning logos, making sublimation print files, color-matching print documents, making minor adjustments to publish documents, creating new graphics, making custom art and much more. Even if you're starting on other platforms like TeeSpring, Society6 or Kickstarter, the Printful design group can assist you with the creation of any designs, graphics or artwork you need.
This is an Perfect service For the ecommerce retailer who has an idea about what designs they would like to publish in their products however aren't certain how to bring it the store owner who would like to outsource the artwork creation so they could free up some time to handle different aspects of building their business. With Printful's dedicated design team you are going to be in great hands, so if this is a service you may need, check out Printful's Design Services page here for more information.
These options help Detract from the impersonal belief that dropshipping can provide and helps to keep your brand consistency from your website to the products your clients receive. To find out more about the branding solutions Printful offers, have a look at this page.
As we have mentioned before What makes Printful such a precious service to use is they're dedicated to not only providing excellent service through their product offering and satisfaction duties, but they also go the extra mile to help vendors utilize Printful to its fullest extent.
· Printing Tips: They supply lots of articles that are easily accessible through their site to help vendors understand the various printing advantages and disadvantages such as DTG print file transparency, cloth details, sublimation printing details, garment printing facts, and information about the best way best to create embroidery files.
· Mockup Generator: Utilize their mockup generator to apply your layouts to their products to get a sense of what the final product will appear to be or to create product pictures on your ecommerce store.
· Gain Calculator: As we've said, the dropshipping business model inherently means you'll be working with slender profit margins, so use their profit calculator to determine just what your margins will be for each product so that you can budget your markup so.
Samples: In order to sample things for yourself or test their goods, they provide discounted product and shipping costs to vendors.
· Blog: Printful's blog is a valuable resource to go to if you are interested in learning more about their merchandise, services, integrations or how to really construct your store how you want it. They're experts on their products and services, so in the event that you want any more information about what they do, then check out their blog posts.
Printful Integrates with all the most widely used ecommerce platforms, and installation for the majority of these platforms is easy and fast. This means that orders get sent to Printful immediately and there is no chance of losing the order or making an error on the order details during the transition.
While Printful offers many different services, resources and tools which are beneficial to their sellers, there are still some aspects of the services they are working to improve. Let's dive into the benefits and disadvantages of utilizing Printful as a dropshipping service provider.
Ultimately, Printful Offers the most effective dropshipping service when it comes to apparel, accessories and homeware distributing and printing. They may not have a huge merchandise offering but what they do offer is high quality, and they try to get it right every time. They also work with their sellers to always improve the products and services they provide whether that's getting new types of merchandise in or adding more selection to what they currently offer. Their drive to provide high quality services and products and to constantly improve their products, resources, and tools is the reason so many sellers choose to work with them.
However, the Main ones which also provide dropshipping include Printify (easy to get confused with Printful,) Print Aura, and Gooten. Some different ones exist, however, there aren't many dropshipper/printers in the video game.
So you're Basically registering for a free account, designing your products, and listing them on your site -all for no charge.
Thus, let us say I Wanted to market some t-shirts with my custom layout printed onto them. Printful has a large group of shirts from different brands and made out of different materials. Each product gets the info listed for pricing, colors, shipping places, and reviews.

original text:
Tolstoy wrote about an honest and hardworking Russian peasant who stayed in a local inn. A man was killed that night and the murderer placed the weapon in the bag of the sleeping peasant. The police discovered it and put the hapless peasant in jail. For twenty-six years the peasant survived the harsh conditions of prison on the bitter hope that someday he would obtain revenge.
After twenty-six years the real murderer was placed in prison and then caught attempting to escape. One prisoner saw everything: the peasant. At long last the opportunity dreamed about since that villainous night twenty-six years ago presented itself, for on the peasant's word the murderer would be put to death. Here was his big chance. If it were you; what would you do?
"Don't get mad, get even!" is our chanted mantra. Maybe an employer treated you unfairly or a coworker climbed to the top over your back. A spouse abandoned you. Your parents failed you. You were "done wrong" as they say and now you are waiting for a chance to retaliate. "Don't get mad, get even" is a reasonable response in the face of gross unfairness, isn't it? No, it is not!
God calls it vengeance and has a lot to say about it. "Dear friends, never avenge yourselves. Leave that to God. For it is written, "I will take vengeance;" (Romans 12:19 ) I don't like God's emphasis on "never avenge." I would want to say, usually. I would seek exceptions for extreme examples like our Russian peasant, but not God. A good Biblical example would be David.
David's refusal to succumb to the temptation of "getting even" was a turning point because he chose to do what was right by repaying evil with good. "If your enemies are hungry, feed them. If they are thirsty, give them something to drink., Don't let evil get the best of you, but conquer evil by doing good." (Romans 12:20-21) David ultimately chose to place his faith in God not revenge.
That night the murderer approached the peasant and on his knees begged for forgiveness. Again, the light of Christ flooded the peasant's heart: "God will forgive you. Maybe I am a hundred times worse." And at those words the peasant's heavy heart grew light as he received God's comfort.
I don't know of any better witness to your faith in God than a willingness to forgive someone who has grievously harmed you.
Is it easy? Never! Is it necessary and worthwhile? Absolutely! Your willingness to forgive could be the principal turning point in your life, your health and your faith.

original text:
and the sun, decided not to shine.
and the cold wind, blows through sunny days.
But they say the climate isn't changing.
And, if it is, then we are not to be blamed.
from a nature where we no longer have a claim.
I write poems in Sinhala and English for my own joy. Listening to a recent policy discussion on climate change in Europe inspired me to write this poem. Of course the experience is from Sri Lanka.
Janaka is an academic of the University of York, United Kingdom. He works with conflict and disaster affected communities in Asia, Africa and the Middle East. Janaka is interested in everything.

original text:
In past elections, Asian Americans have faced a series of barriers in exercising their right to vote, including segregated "Asian" voting lines. When the news media reported on election results, Asian Americans were overlooked. In response, the Asian American Legal Defense and Education Fund (AALDEF) has conducted a non-partisan survey of Asian American voters to document Asian American voting patterns and document instances of anti-Asian voter disenfranchisement. AALDEF has also monitored the elections for compliance with the federal Voting Rights Act, which mandates bilingual ballots and forbids anti-Asian voter discrimination.
We need your help. In the 2012 elections, 850 volunteers polled 9,096 Asian American voters in 14 states and Washington, DC. All are welcome to volunteer for our exit poll, which we will conduct in CA, FL, GA, LA, MA, MD, MI, NJ, NM, NV, NY, PA, TX, VA, and Washington, DC. Exit poll volunteers work in 3-hour shifts. We are also looking for law students and attorneys to monitor polls in NY, NJ, MA, and possibly in MI and PA. We will conduct mandatory 60-minute community trainings (90 minutes for CLE trainings) in all of these regions. All volunteers must be non-partisan during the time that they help. Complete the form at . Thank you!
For more information, contact AALDEF Democracy Program Director Jerry Vattamala or Voting Rights Organizer Iris Zalun at 800-966-5946 or votingrights@aaldef.org.
Trainings for AAPI Election Protection Program--This Week!
NQAPIA on West Coast Swing!
Ask President Obama to End Racial and Religious Profiling, Detention, & Deportation!
